checks.description: Validate that wave does not exceed its 5-bit range and respects direction change boundaries without assuming exact latency.
checks.pass_condition: wave stays within 0..31 and when reaching 31 it does not increase further, and when reaching 0 it does not decrease further, across any number of clock cycles.
checks.trigger_condition: When the design is running after reset and clock edges are observed.

checks.description: Observe that wave changes value on successive clock edges, indicating progress.
checks.pass_condition: At least one change in wave value is observed within a bounded number of clock cycles after reset release.
